menu.disclaimer: HonestSIP calculators are for educational purposes only. Not financial advice. Tax calculations based on Budget 2024 rates.
menu.footer: HonestSIP calculators are for educational and planning purposes only. They do not constitute financial advice. Mutual fund investments are subject to market risks. Tax calculations effective July 23, 2024 (Budget 2024). Peer benchmarking based on RBI, AMFI, WID India, PLFS data.

forwardSIP.header_desc: What will your SIP grow to? The foundation of every financial plan.
forwardSIP.inputs_hint: Starting investment amount. Step-up will increase this annually.
forwardSIP.res_nominal: Nominal value after {{years}} years at {{rate}}% annual return
forwardSIP.disclaimer: HonestSIP calculators are for educational purposes only. Mutual fund investments are subject to market risks. Past returns are not indicative of future performance.

childEdu.header_desc: Course-specific defaults with {{rate}}% education inflation. Every year of delay compounds the gap.
childEdu.delay_cost: Every month you delay costs your child
childEdu.note: 📌 Education inflation in India is 10–11% (EY-CII Report 2023). This calculator uses course-specific rates, not the generic 6%. MBBS private college uses 12% — healthcare inflation (IRDAI 2024).
childEdu.disclaimer: Full {{years}}-year program fee used. Covers all years, not just Year 1. For educational purposes only.

waterfall.title: Corpus Erosion Waterfall
waterfall.teaser_end: in today's money after inflation, tax & fund charges.
waterfall.footer_note: * TER drag is calculated as the compounded difference between gross return and net return. The TER is implicitly embedded in historical fund returns. Surcharge and exact STCG/LTCG calculations approximate holding periods for SIPs (FIFO).

gross.title: Gross Corpus (before any deductions)
gross.tip: The total value of your SIP if there were absolutely no fund charges, taxes, or inflation.

stamp.title: − Stamp Duty (0.005% on purchases)
stamp.tip: 0.005% government levy on every mutual fund purchase. Deducted at the point of unit allotment.

ter.title: − TER Drag (Compounded fund charges)
ter.tip: The compounded effect of the annual fee your fund house charges to manage the fund.

stt.title: − STT on Redemption (0.001%)
stt.tip: Securities Transaction Tax — a government levy on every buy and sell of equity fund units.

exit_load.title: − Exit Load
exit_load.tip: A fee charged by the AMC if you redeem before the lock-in period. Zero if you stay invested longer.

invested.title: Total Invested (your actual cost)
invested.tip: The total cash you paid from your bank account over the entire period.

gains.title: Gross Gains (corpus − invested)
gains.tip: The total profit generated before tax.

tax_ltcg.title: − LTCG Tax (12.5% above ₹1.25L)
tax_ltcg.tip: Tax on your profit. Re-calculated according to Budget 2024 rules.

tax_stcg.title: − STCG Tax (20% flat)
tax_stcg.tip: Tax on your profit. Re-calculated according to Budget 2024 rules.

tax_slab.title: − Capital Gains Tax (Slab Rate)
tax_slab.tip: Tax on your profit. Re-calculated according to Budget 2024 rules.

tax_crypto.title: − Capital Gains Tax (30% flat)
tax_crypto.tip: Flat 30% tax on crypto assets in India.

cess.title: − Health & Education Cess (4%)
cess.tip: 4% additional charge on your capital gains tax. Applied to all taxpayers.

surcharge.title: − Surcharge (High Income)
surcharge.tip: Extra tax for high earners (income > ₹50L). Charged on top of capital gains tax.

inflation.title: − Inflation Erosion (Purchasing power loss)
inflation.tip: Not a fee — it is the purchasing power your corpus loses to rising prices over time.

real_takehome.title: 🏁 Your Real Take-Home (Today's value)
real_takehome.tip: What your money will actually buy when you withdraw it, measured in today's prices.

tips.inflation: Consider a mix of equity and inflation-linked assets. At current inflation, your money halves in purchasing power every 12 years.
tips.ter: Switch to a direct plan. Regular plans have 0.5–1% higher TER than direct plans — on your corpus size, that difference alone equals {{terDrag}} over your investment period.
tips.tax: Holding just a few more months will shift your gains from 20% STCG to 12.5% LTCG — saving you a massive amount in tax.
tips.surcharge: At your income level, surcharge adds heavily to your effective tax rate. Consider spreading redemptions across financial years to stay below the ₹50L threshold.
tips.good: Your investment structure is highly efficient. Keep compounding.
